title: spiraea sorbifolia var. alpina
intro: Spiraea sorbifolia var. alpina, also known as Alpine Spiraea, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. Alpine Spiraea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
